description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes. The property is surrounded by a low wall and features landscaped gardens with palm trees and shrubs. The front of the house includes a driveway with space for multiple vehicles and a covered entryway. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to outdoor patios and terraces. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious backyard with additional greenery and seating areas. The overall structure is expansive, with a single main story and a partial second level, emphasizing horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, landscaped gardens, and a spacious driveway. The design features clean lines, open patios, and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the driveway, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, continuous wall, minimal windows, and the extent of the property boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, outdoor seating areas, and large glass doors opening to the patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entry, additional patio space, and more of the garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a modern door adjacent to the driveway
